IMO (Circor) · Pumps & Valves

IMO ACE / ACG / ACF / ACD Triple Screw Pump

Spare parts for IMO (Circor / Colfax) ACE, ACG, ACF, ACD low-pressure triple-screw pumps – LO circulating, fuel, hydraulic, and transfer service.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
IMO SPARE PARTS KIT CODING SYSTEM 11
Part NumberDescription
G011G011 – Rotor Set (CCW rotation only)
G012G012 – Rotor Set (CW rotation, standard)
G015G015 – Rebuilding Set (includes G012)
G050G050 – Shaft Seal (complete)
G051G051 – Sealing Element
G052G052 – Mechanical Seal
G053G053 – Minor Kit (= G050 + G057)
G054G054 – Major Kit (= G012 + G053 + valve spring 615)
G057G057 – Joint Kit (gaskets + O-rings + sealing washers)
G070G070 – Valve Element (bypass valve complete)
G082G082 – SealGuard Kit
ACD 025 NUMBERS 8
Part NumberDescription
062885G012 Rotor Set – ACD 025 Normal lead (pump form N6)
062893G012 Rotor Set – ACD 025 Low lead (pump form L6)
190848G050 Complete Shaft Seal – ACD version xVxx
190810G050 Complete Shaft Seal – ACD version xTxx
–calc: 190848+183681–G053 Minor Kit – ACD (= G050 + G057)
183681G057 Joint Kit – ACD 025
018523615 – Valve Spring (bypass valve)
–order components–G054 Major Kit – ACD (= G012 + G050 + G057 + 615)
ACE / ACG SERIES NUMBERS 21
Part NumberDescription
189964G050 Shaft Seal – ACE/ACG xVxx version
190501G053 Minor Kit – ACE/ACG xVxx (= G050 189964 + G057)
190503G053 Minor Kit – ACE/ACG (variant)
191599G053 Minor Kit – ACG 060 N7 (specific model)
190482Rotor Set G012 (ACE/ACG – specify model for correct variant)
190619Rotor Set G012 (ACE/ACG variant 2)
190487Rotor Set G012 (ACE/ACG variant 3)
191653Shaft Seal G050 variant
190783Shaft Seal G050 variant 2
191247Minor Kit G053 variant
179523Part (6-digit – verify application)
191700Part (6-digit – verify application)
191248Part (6-digit – verify application)
191243Part (6-digit – verify application)
179507Part (6-digit – verify application)
192958Part (6-digit – verify application)
192553Part (6-digit – verify application)
192786Part (6-digit – verify application)
187567Part (6-digit – verify application)
191245Part (6-digit – verify application)
191251Part (6-digit – verify application)
IMO AFTERMARKET / OEM CROSS-REFERENCE PART NUMBERS 15
Part NumberDescription
PP047BMBearing (replaces IMO OEM)
PP047BDBearing (alt. size – replaces IMO OEM)
PP056SB1-134O-Ring (replaces IMO OEM)
PP056TB1-011O-Ring (alt. – replaces IMO OEM)
PP028KA-200Retaining Ring (replaces IMO OEM)
PP028KA-175Retaining Ring (alt.)
PP028KA-118Retaining Ring (alt.)
PP028KA-156Retaining Ring (alt.)
PP028KA-78Retaining Ring (alt.)
PP046JKNSeal (shaft seal – replaces IMO OEM)
3242/350RAMinor Repair Kit (replaces IMO OEM kit)
3242/253RAMinor Repair Kit (alt.)
3242/250RAMinor Repair Kit (alt.)
3242/351RAMinor Repair Kit (alt.)
3242/252RAMinor Repair Kit (alt.)
IMO COMPONENT POSITION REFERENCE 16
Part NumberDescription
Pos. 1020Power Rotor (drive spindle) – CW rotation
Pos. 201/202Idler Rotors (qty 2 per pump)
Pos. 351Balancing Bush
Pos. 122Ball Bearing
Pos. 113Key (shaft)
Pos. 125Secondary Seal (O-ring behind shaft seal)
Pos. 401Pump Body
Pos. 418Gasket (suction flange)
Pos. 423Gasket (discharge flange)
Pos. 506O-Ring (front cover)
Pos. 509Shaft Seal complete
Pos. 556Gasket (rear cover)
Pos. 614Valve Piston (bypass valve)
Pos. 615 / p/n 018523Valve Spring (bypass valve)
Pos. 605O-Ring (valve – lower)
Pos. 602Sealing Washer (bypass valve cover)

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
